title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at PwC India

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at PwC India
jsonLd.description:
PwC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Faridabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About PwC India:
PwC India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PwC India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
